===Pokémon Pocket Monsters===
[[File:Chuck PM.png|thumb|220px|Chuck in Pokémon Pocket Monsters]]
Chuck appears in ''[[PM096|Defeat Chuck Style Martial Arts!!]]'' where he is considered a karate master. After {{PPM|Red}} witnesses his strength with lifting cars, he has a Gym battle with Chuck.
